Upscaler Studio · by EDITH Dev Studio

Upscale locally. Export confidently.

A premium Windows-first AI upscaling tool for image and video workflows, built around local processing, batch execution, compare tools, history, and a stronger desktop experience.

Core capabilities

A real product surface, not a script wrapper.

The site positions Upscaler Studio as a serious desktop product and leaves room for future EDITH releases.

Windows desktop workflow

Position the app as a premium Windows tool with clear product value, not a loose collection of scripts.

Image and video upscaling

Mixed-media workflow positioning helps separate it from single-purpose low-end utilities.

Local processing

Privacy, control, and hardware ownership become part of the product story.

Batch and compare

Show repeatable processing, comparison, and iteration as core product strengths.

History and visibility

Frame the product as something users can trust and inspect, not a black box.

Commercial-ready direction

Website, download, pricing, support, and legal structure are already shaped for launch.

Pricing strategy

Start simple. Price like a premium indie desktop tool.

Keep the commercial model clean at launch: a trial path and one main paid license.

Publisher

EDITH Dev Studio

The site is designed so Upscaler Studio is the flagship product today, while the structure remains ready for future tools.

  • Future products can live under /products
  • Current homepage can act as studio + flagship product page
  • Legal and support pages already scale across future releases

FAQ

Key questions already handled

These are structured as publishable placeholders, not final legal promises.

Is the website already connected to real checkout?

Not yet. Buttons are structured so you can connect Lemon Squeezy or another provider later.

Is the legal content final?

No. Privacy, terms, support, and refund-related content still need real legal identity and operational details.

Can the site host future products too?

Yes. The navigation and product structure are already designed around EDITH Dev Studio as publisher.

Why Astro for this site?

Because the public site is mostly content, branding, product pages, and legal pages. Astro keeps it fast and cheap to host.

Launch path

Build the site now. Connect the release later.

This keeps the visual and brand layer moving forward while software release blockers are being fixed.

Open product page Open support page
